title: Gfergus
compiled_truth: Gfergus is an external contact at [Brobeck](companies/brobeck). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-09-19), Gfergus sent 143 and received 701 emails, totalling 844 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (127), [Sbishop](people/sbishop-gibbs-bruns) (60), [Jfrizzell](people/jfrizzell-gibbs-bruns) (58), [Pmeringolo](people/pmeringolo-brobeck) (50), [Djn](people/djn-pkns) (45).
